news.headline: Lebanon Emerges as Weak Link in U.S.-Iran Deal to End War
news.summary: The conflict between Israel and Hezbollah, once seen as a secondary front to the American-Israeli war on Iran, has become one of the main obstacles to ending it.

news.headline: Thirty dead at DRC displacement camp as Ebola threat grows
news.summary: At least 30 people have died since May in the Kigonze displacement camp in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

news.headline: USA beat Australia 2–0 to book knockout spot at World Cup
news.summary: An own goal and a goal by Alex Freeman helped the home side maintain a perfect record and progress to the round of 32.

news.headline: Trump, Hegseth Praise New Medal of Honor Recipients
news.summary: President Donald J. Trump and Secretary of War Pete Hegseth lauded the intrepid valor of three servicemen whom the commander in chief awarded the Medal of Honor to at a White House ceremony.

news.headline: Zelensky stripped of highest Polish honour over WW2 name of army unit
news.summary: Ukraine has denounced the move, calling it a "strategic mistake" and "disrespectful".

news.headline: World Cup 2026: Saibari's early goal hands Morocco narrow win over Scotland
news.summary: Ismael Saibari scored the fastest goal of the World Cup so far after just 71 seconds as Morocco secured a narrow 1-0 win over Scotland on Friday to close in on a place in the knockout round. The Scots pushed hard for an equaliser in the ⁠secondhalf but never had a shot on target during the match.

news.headline: Spain’s Yamal says ‘very early, unnecessary’ to play full World Cup match
news.summary: 'It's not the time to play a whole match,' Lamine Yamal said ahead of Spain's match against Saudi Arabia.

news.headline: As populations fall, nations that can tap human potential will succeed
news.summary: For much of the 20th century, many were accustomed to thinking of people as an ever-expanding resource.
